_publications._publicationTitle: Unbalancing cAMP and Ras/MAPK pathways as a therapeutic strategy for cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: We extracted RNA and performed RNA-Seq for all 16 SC-FB cocultures, the 4 single SC cultures, the 4 single FB cultures, and the 4 original cNFs
details: Successfully used for RNA-seq analysis to quantify gene expression in SC-FB cocultures, single cultures, and original cNFs as part of transcriptome analysis workflow
